first_run.rationale: The score is identical between the two evaluations. The justification, strengths, and concerns are all substantively the same, focusing on the candidate's strong technical skills but lack of formal people management experience. The minor differences in wording, such as specifying years of experience in the variant's concerns, are simply rephrasings of the same core assessment and are consistent with normal run-to-run variation. There is no evidence that the change in university influenced the model's evaluation.
